items.title: Australian IS families in Syria camp turned back after leaving for home
items.dek: The group of 34 women and children with family links to Islamic State group have been held in the Roj camp for nearly seven years.
items.body: The group of 34 women and children with family links to Islamic State group have been held in the Roj camp for nearly seven years.

items.title: Actor Robert Duvall, who starred in The Godfather, dies aged 95
items.dek: The Oscar-winner died "peacefully" at his home in Middleburg, Virginia, on Sunday, his family says.
items.body: The Oscar-winner died "peacefully" at his home in Middleburg, Virginia, on Sunday, his family says.
